channel.title: Vi on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Vi on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to buy Jio, Airtel, Vi sim card online for free.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-fFEN-sL3_-Q/YZE8-lfO-yI/AAAAAAAAHSo/NrfXKTn-6hsT6Vx2xYmgtrgPv5bSai06ACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1636908275895587-0.png" alt=""> In 20th century, we just need little sim card to connect with world either to call, sms or use internet services, we can do all by just recharging it with required packs based on the network provider which could cost you few bucks as in india from 2017 due to jio call and data packs become very cheaper that millions of people started buying Jio sim cards by standing in big lines infront of jio digital stores.
